channel.title: Posts on Hey there!
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Hey there!

item.title: Hugo Setup
item.description: Preparation Download hugo The binary Move the binary into your existing $PATH or append your path to it Create repositories To make things easier, make sure all your branches are on master One for storing the code (e.g. BLOG) One for hosting provided by Github Pages (name: GH_USERNAME.github.io) Basic Setup Linking your code repository with Github hugo new site HUGO_LOCAL_DIRNAME_WHATEVER git remote add origin https://github.
